message:
refactor: minor TS cleanup — naming, type placement, magic numbers

- Move PositionedNode interface near top of sdk.ts before first usage
- Rename LINE_HEIGHT to EXTRA_LINE_PX to avoid confusion with lineHeight
- Add private _getNodes() accessor, remove unsafe `as unknown` cast in fromMermaid
- Extract EXCALIDRAW_VERSION constant shared between sdk.ts and executor.ts
- Hoist dynamic fs import in render() to single import before format loop
